_comment: Local model context for agent-flow/api/. Reads full model settings from model-map.json at project root.

models_in_use.local_role: agent flow ai-call step default model
models_in_use.local_flow: ai_run.php executes agent flow step sequences. For steps of type 'ai-call', if no model is specified in the step props the default falls back to gpt-4o-mini. The provider is read from props (defaults to openai). Results are stored in a variable map and can be referenced by later steps.
models_in_use.fallback: if inputVar resolves to empty string the step is skipped with result 'skipped -- inputVar is empty'. API errors surface in the step result field.
